cityThesis: One narrow exact-site hosted review motion targeting AMR integrators executing digital-twin simulations in multi-tenant 3PL logistics environments.

rightsPath.summary: Implement a 3-Tier multi-tenant consent packet (Property Owner, Facility Operator, Inventory Tenant) before authorizing capture dispatch.

validationBlockers.summary: Verify exact-site artifact compatibility with NVIDIA Omniverse and iWAREHOUSE before live outreach.
Verify if export-controlled or dual-use industrial buyers mandate air-gapped delivery over Blueprint-WebApp.

requiredApprovals.reason: New city activation and ITAR/Defense proximity exceptions require founder gate.
Dispatch into industrial 3PLs requires COI, thermal limit, and 3-Tier Consent verification.
Requires manual verification of proprietary multi-tenant IP scrub before artifact materialization.

issueSeeds.title: Lock the first multi-tenant lawful access path
issueSeeds.summary: Secure the first complete 3-Tier Consent packet for an ambient-temperature McClellan Park industrial module.
successCriteria: First lawful access path is signed by owner, operator, and tenant.

metricsDependencies.notes: Ensure intake parsing matches specific integrator demand.
Track distribution between exact_site, adjacent_site, and scoped_follow_up.
Establish baseline pipeline processing time for feature-sparse industrial spaces.
Verifies technical engagement from the simulation engineer.
Crucial for identifying air-gap blockers or stack ingestion failures.

namedClaims.subject: Raymond West
namedClaims.claim: Integrator actively deploying Cyngn DriveMod Tuggers and utilizing iWAREHOUSE.

namedClaims.subject: NVIDIA Omniverse / iWAREHOUSE
namedClaims.claim: The exported spatial artifact must be seamlessly ingested into NVIDIA digital-twin tools or proprietary layout systems.

namedClaims.subject: Air-Gapped Delivery
namedClaims.claim: Defense-adjacent industrial environments (McClellan) may strictly require on-premise artifact delivery over web SaaS.
